patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: TennoGen: 29.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenistar disc not expiring when in Titania’s Razorwing mode.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.additions: Added login milestone reward blueprints (Zenistar, Azima, Zenith, and Sigma & Octantis) to Simaris' Offerings.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Clients not seeing the Zenistar's disc if they join-in-progress while it's active. They would then see it appear when it's destroyed by the Host.
Fixed Clients not seeing custom colours on the Zenistar's disc.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.3.1 - Nightwave
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenistar not launching projectile on Charge Attack.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.1 - 22.17.1.1
patchlogs.changes: Azima, Zenistar, and Zenith will now show in your Profile.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zenistar not throwing out the disc when the Tengoken Skin is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Limbo's Stasis not properly pausing Zenistar VFX and duration timer.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Alt Fire key to detonate Zenith disc when both discs of Zenistar and Zenith weapon has been launched resulting in the detonation removing the HUD icon for Zenistar disc.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Toned down the density of the Zenistars FX.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.changes: Added a UI indicator to Zenith (just like Zenistar) that shows how much time you have left on the disc before it's automatically recalled.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error possibly related to when the Zenistar disk is launched but the player dies before it is recalled.

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Update 20.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Zenistar Charge attacks increasing the attack speed when equipped with the Dominion Skin.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed (for real this time) attaining free health by channeling as enemies pass through the Caustacyst goo with Life Strike equipped. Also fixes similar issue with the Zenistar’s charge disc.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed attaining free health by channeling as enemies pass through the Caustacyst goo with Life Strike equipped. Also fixes similar issue with the Zenistar. 
Fixed Limbo being able to damage enemies while remaining invincible in the Rift with the Caustacyst or the Zenistar charge attack.

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zenistars charge disc range FX not increasing in size when equipping melee range Mods (i.e. Primed Reach).

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: U4+4.1
patchlogs.additions: Added a buff-icon and timer for the Zenistar's disc projectile.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Zenistars disc returning to AFK/dead players.
